assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: The response correctly uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the BFCM period (Nov 20 - Dec 5) and explicitly mentions it blocks everything including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: The response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades for the June code freeze period and mentions it blocks ALL upgrades

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: The response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades for persistent control and includes --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support that auto-tracks End of Support date

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: The response explicitly mentions the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions and shows the persistent exclusion using until-end-of-support for minor version control

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: All gcloud commands include the specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flag with appropriate values (no_upgrades, no_minor_or_node_upgrades)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: The response mentions 'Maximum 3 exclusions per cluster' and '48-hour maintenance window requirement - within any 32-day period, at least 48 hours must be available for maintenance'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL maintenance controls' and shows how to perform manual upgrades that bypass the exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response mentions 'Security patch accumulation - during no upgrades periods, you'll miss security patches and need to catch up afterward' as a tradeoff
